GET /hosts.description: Hosts table sorted by last_seen desc; renders templates/hosts.html

POST /hosts/<id>/status.description: Update Host.status to one of pending/approved/rejected/pushed

POST /hosts/<id>/type.description: Update Host.host_type to one of server/workstation/iot/network/unknown

POST /hosts/bulk.description: Bulk status/type update for multiple selected hosts

GET /reconcile.description: Reconciliation view — new/matched/stale relative to NetBox

POST /reconcile/import.description: Pull existing NetBox devices/VMs into the staging DB

cli:netbox-auto discover.description: Run all configured collectors, merge by MAC, persist to staging DB

cli:netbox-auto push.description: Push approved hosts to NetBox + DNS (--dry-run, --skip-netbox, --skip-dns)

cli:netbox-auto status.description: Show host counts by status/type and most recent DiscoveryRun
